title: Treat deep links as a routing contract
description: Validate and authorize every deep link and universal link target, handling cold start, logged-out state, and unknown paths safely.
body: Use when adding or changing deep links, universal/app links, or custom URL schemes. Do not assume the app is warm, the user is authenticated, or the path is valid when a link opens the app. Actions: validate and sanitize link parameters, gate protected destinations behind auth, handle cold-start navigation, and route unknown paths to a safe fallback. Validation signals include tests opening each link from cold start, logged-out, and tampered-parameter states. Risk boundary: an unauthenticated or unvalidated deep link can expose protected screens or be used for injection; deny navigation to protected targets until auth and parameter checks pass.
